modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log into Office 365 WebMail account

full_description_text:  
I was trying to check my email on Office 365, you know, the one we use for work. I entered my username and password like I always do, but then the page just refreshed without any message or anything. It’s really strange because I can’t access my Outlook email at all. I even saw an error that said something about not having a mailbox or a license, which sounds confusing to me.
short_description: Unable to log into Office 365 WebMail account
